description_blurb: An FBI memo from 1958 reporting a UFO sighting by a Detroit man who described a "circular object with a crystal-type dome," and recommending that the information be forwarded to "proper air force authorities."
title: 65_HS1-101634279_100-DE-18221_Serial_844
summary: An FBI memo from April 17, 1958, reporting a UFO sighting by David Weaver in Detroit, Michigan. Weaver described a 'circular object with a crystal-type dome' that reflected lights, moving in a northern direction. He attempted to contact Selfridge Field (Air Force) unsuccessfully before reporting to the FBI. The memo recommends forwarding the information to proper Air Force authorities.
reported_object_description: circular object with a crystal-type dome that reflected lights
reported_behavior: passing in a northern direction from southwest and crossed the City
official_resolution: Information recommended to be forwarded to Air Force authorities.
bust_reasoning: The report relies solely on a single visual witness who admitted to not being 'too familiar with the identification of aircraft.' The object's description ('circular object with a crystal-type dome that reflected lights') and its linear movement are consistent with several prosaic explanations, such as a high-altitude balloon or a distant aircraft, especially given the early morning, dark conditions. There is no corroborating evidence from other sensors or witnesses, nor any anomalous kinematics reported.
full_text:
# 65_HS1-101634279_100-DE-18221_Serial_844 - Page 1

[Box at top]
Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.
Screened by NARA (RF) 11-25-2025 FOIA # 90288 DOCID: 34715588

STANDARD FORM NO. 64
Office Memorandum • UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT

TO : SAC, DETROIT
DATE: April 17, 1958

FROM : SA ROBERT ROSS REYNOLDS

SUBJECT: UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS

DAVID WEAVER, 15801 Decosta, Detroit, Michigan, Telephone No. KEnwood 5-7546, telephonically advised this office at 4:08 A.M., today, that he had just seen an object in the sky described as a circular object with a crystal-type dome that reflected lights. He said this object was passing in a northern direction from southwest and crossed the City three blocks south of Six Mile at Lamphere Street.

WEAVER advised that he attempted to call Selfridge Field to get in touch with the Air Force but his attempts were unproductive. He then called the office to furnish the above information.

WEAVER said he was 23 years of age, was the son of a Detroit policeman, and that he had previous experience with the Civil Air Patrol (CAP); however, he was not too familiar with the identification of aircraft. WEAVER stated he was on his way home from his employment in Detroit when he observed instant object.

RECOMMENDATION

Advise proper air force authorities.

RRR/mac
(1)

[Handwritten note on left]:
Mor
FOIA/PA
844
3/89
DO NOT DESTROY SERIAL
PRIOR TO

[Handwritten note in center]:
Lt Col (Bernie)
E Prater
advised
4/17/58
to letter me mps

[Box on right]:
100-26505
100-18221-844
SEARCHED [x] INDEXED [x]
SERIALIZED [x] FILED [x]
APR 17 1958
FBI - DETROIT

NW 90288
DocId:34715588 Page 1
cover_up_reasoning: The document is a standard FBI internal memo with no content redactions. It explicitly states its declassification authority and FOIA number, indicating a transparent release process. All names and details are present, and the recommendation is a routine referral to the Air Force, showing no attempt to suppress information.
summary_zh: 一份联邦调查局于1958年4月17日发布的备忘录，报告了戴维·韦弗在密歇根州底特律目击不明飞行物事件。韦弗描述了一个“带有水晶状圆顶的圆形物体”，该物体反射光线并向北移动。他曾尝试联系塞尔弗里奇机场（空军）但未果，随后向联邦调查局报告。该备忘录建议将此信息转呈相关空军部门。
reported_object_description_zh: 带有水晶状圆顶并反射光线的圆形物体
reported_behavior_zh: 从西南方向向北移动并横越城市
official_resolution_zh: 建议将信息转呈空军部门。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告仅依赖于一名目击证人，该证人承认“对飞机识别不太熟悉”。该物体描述（“带有水晶状圆顶并反射光线的圆形物体”）及其线性移动与几种常见的解释相符，例如高空 H气球或远距离飞机，尤其是在清晨、黑暗的条件下。没有来自其他传感器或目击者的佐证，也没有报告任何异常运动学特征。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件是一份标准的联邦调查局内部备忘录，没有内容删节。它明确说明了解密权限和《信息自由法》编号，表明其发布过程透明。所有姓名和细节均已披露，且建议是例行性地转呈空军，未显示任何压制信息的企图。
claims: Witness observed a circular object with a crystal-type dome that reflected lights.
Object was passing in a northern direction from southwest over Detroit.
Witness attempted to contact Air Force authorities.
FBI recommended advising proper Air Force authorities about the sighting.
claims_zh: 目击者观察到一个带有水晶状圆顶并反射光线的圆形物体。
该物体从西南方向向北移动，飞越底特律。
目击者曾尝试联系空军部门。
联邦调查局建议将该目击事件告知相关空军部门。
bust_explanations: High-altitude balloon: The description of a 'circular object with a crystal-type dome that reflected lights' and its linear movement across the city is consistent with a weather balloon or similar high-altitude craft, especially if catching city lights or early morning sun at altitude. The 'dome' could be a specific part of the balloon or its gondola.

Distant aircraft: From a distance, particularly at night or twilight, an aircraft could appear circular. Its cockpit canopy could be misinterpreted as a 'crystal-type dome,' and its lights or fuselage could reflect city lights. The reported linear movement is entirely consistent with an aircraft, and the witness admitted to not being 'too familiar with the identification of aircraft'.

Rocket body or satellite re-entry/pass: A tumbling satellite or rocket body in orbit could appear circular and reflective, especially if catching the sun's rays at high altitude before local sunrise. The 'crystal-type dome' could be a reflective or transparent component, and its movement would be linear across the sky.
bust_explanations_zh: 高空 H气球：对“带有水晶状圆顶并反射光线的圆形物体”的描述及其横越城市的线性移动，与气象气球或类似高空飞行器相符，尤其是在高空捕捉到城市灯光或清晨阳光时。“圆顶”可能是气球或其吊舱的特定部分。
远距离飞机：从远距离看，尤其是在夜间或黄昏时，飞机可能呈现圆形。其驾驶舱罩可能被误认为是“水晶状圆顶”，其灯光或机身可能反射城市灯光。报告的线性移动与飞机完全一致，且目击者承认“对飞机识别不太熟悉”。
火箭残骸或卫星再入/经过：在轨道上翻滚的卫星或火箭残骸可能呈现圆形并具有反射性，尤其是在当地日出前在高空捕捉到太阳光线时。“水晶状圆顶”可能是一个反射性或透明的部件，其移动将是线性地横越天空。
